name: "Cradle of Fragrance"
description: A flower basket commonly found in the flower shops of Millhaven, brimming with freshly cut blooms of many colors and a rich, lingering aroma.\nOnce parted from the soil that raised them, flowers can remain fresh only for a fleeting time. But they rarely go unclaimed — those who cherish life's beauties soon carry them away, whether to brighten a room or to gift them to someone dear...
